requirement_topic.en: Explosive Atmosphere (ATEX) Equipment Certification for Hydrogen Electrolyzers
requirement_topic.zh: 氢电解槽爆炸性环境（ATEX）设备认证
requirement_topic.zht: 氫電解槽爆炸性環境（ATEX）設備認證

summary.en: Equipment and protective systems intended for use in potentially explosive atmospheres (including hydrogen gas zones) must comply with ATEX Directive 2014/34/EU. Hydrogen electrolyzer electrical components in or adjacent to hydrogen-producing zones must be classified and certified under the appropriate equipment category (e.g., Category 1G or 2G for gas/vapour explosive atmospheres). Conformity assessment for Categories 1 and 2 requires involvement of a EU Notified Body; Category 3 allows manufacturer self-declaration. Harmonised standard EN IEC 60079 series (Explosive Atmospheres) specifies technical construction and testing requirements for Ex-rated equipment.
summary.zh: 用于潜在爆炸性环境（包括氢气区）的设备和保护系统须符合ATEX指令2014/34/EU。氢电解槽在氢气产生区域内或附近的电气部件，须按适当设备类别（如气体/蒸气爆炸性环境的1G或2G类）进行分类和认证。第1、2类合格评定需欧盟公告机构参与；第3类允许制造商自行声明。协调标准EN IEC 60079系列（爆炸性环境）规定Ex额定设备的技术结构和测试要求。
summary.zht: 用於潛在爆炸性環境（包括氫氣區）的設備和保護系統須符合ATEX指令2014/34/EU。氫電解槽在氫氣產生區域內或附近的電氣部件，須按適當設備類別（如氣體/蒸氣爆炸性環境的1G或2G類）進行分類和認證。第1、2類合格評定需歐盟公告機構參與；第3類允許製造商自行聲明。協調標準EN IEC 60079系列（爆炸性環境）規定Ex額定設備的技術結構和測試要求。

standards_or_laws: EN 1127-1 (Explosive atmospheres — Basic concepts and methodology)

summary.en: China requires Ex certification under the GB 3836 series (Electrical apparatus for explosive gas atmospheres), administered by CESI or other CNEX-accredited bodies. The GB 3836 series is technically aligned with IEC 60079 but constitutes a separate national certification regime. Products must obtain a Chinese Ex certificate and explosion-proof mark before sale or use in China. GB/T 3836.1 covers general requirements; subsequent parts mirror IEC 60079 sub-series for specific protection methods.
summary.zh: 中国要求依据GB 3836系列（爆炸性气体环境用电气设备）进行Ex认证，由CESI或其他CNEX认可机构负责。GB 3836系列在技术上与IEC 60079对标，但构成独立的国家认证体系。产品在中国境内销售或使用前须取得中国Ex证书及防爆标志。GB/T 3836.1涵盖通用要求；后续各部分对应IEC 60079子系列的各种防护方式。
summary.zht: 中國要求依據GB 3836系列（爆炸性氣體環境用電氣設備）進行Ex認證，由CESI或其他CNEX認可機構負責。GB 3836系列在技術上與IEC 60079對標，但構成獨立的國家認證體系。產品在中國境內銷售或使用前須取得中國Ex證書及防爆標誌。GB/T 3836.1涵蓋通用要求；後續各部分對應IEC 60079子系列的各種防護方式。

standards_or_laws: GB 3836.1-2021 (爆炸性环境 第1部分：设备 通用要求)
GB/T 3836 series (additional parts mirroring IEC 60079 sub-series)

gap.en: Chinese GB 3836 Ex certificates issued by CNEX-accredited bodies are NOT accepted in the EU. For EU market entry, a separate ATEX conformity assessment under 2014/34/EU is mandatory, including EU-type examination by a Notified Body for Category 1 and 2 equipment. The CE marking (ATEX) and EU Declaration of Conformity must be obtained. Hydrogen electrolyzer manufacturers holding only Chinese Ex marks must commission a new EU Notified Body assessment and affix the specific ATEX Ex marking (including notified body number for categories 1 and 2) before placing equipment on the EU market.
gap.zh: CNEX认可机构颁发的中国GB 3836 Ex证书在欧盟不被接受。进入欧盟市场，须依据2014/34/EU强制进行独立的ATEX合格评定，第1、2类设备还需公告机构进行EU型式检验。须取得CE标志（ATEX）及欧盟符合性声明。仅持有中国防爆标志的氢电解槽制造商，须委托欧盟公告机构重新评定，并在将设备投放欧盟市场前加贴特定ATEX Ex标志（第1、2类须含公告机构编号）。
gap.zht: CNEX認可機構頒發的中國GB 3836 Ex證書在歐盟不被接受。進入歐盟市場，須依據2014/34/EU強制進行獨立的ATEX合格評定，第1、2類設備還需公告機構進行EU型式檢驗。須取得CE標誌（ATEX）及歐盟符合性聲明。僅持有中國防爆標誌的氫電解槽製造商，須委託歐盟公告機構重新評定，並在將設備投放歐盟市場前加貼特定ATEX Ex標誌（第1、2類須含公告機構編號）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (EU) — ATEX CE marking required for all equipment in scope placed on EU market
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (CN) — GB 3836 Ex certification required for explosive-atmosphere equipment in China

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Equipment for use in hydrogen explosive-atmosphere zones entering the EU market must carry ATEX CE marking under Directive 2014/34/EU, with EN IEC 60079 series as harmonised standards. Chinese GB 3836 Ex certification is a parallel national regime and is not mutually recognised. A separate EU Notified Body assessment is required for Category 1 and 2 equipment. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入欧盟市场的氢气爆炸性环境区域用设备，须依据指令2014/34/EU加贴ATEX CE标志，以EN IEC 60079系列为协调标准。中国GB 3836防爆认证为独立的国家体系，双方不存在互认安排。第1、2类设备须另行委托欧盟公告机构评定。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律意见。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入歐盟市場的氫氣爆炸性環境區域用設備，須依據指令2014/34/EU加貼ATEX CE標誌，以EN IEC 60079系列為協調標準。中國GB 3836防爆認證為獨立的國家體系，雙方不存在互認安排。第1、2類設備須另行委託歐盟公告機構評定。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律意見。

requirement_topic.en: Machinery Safety Directive (CE) for Hydrogen Electrolyzers
requirement_topic.zh: 氢电解槽机械指令（CE）安全要求
requirement_topic.zht: 氫電解槽機械指令（CE）安全要求

summary.en: Water electrolyzers constitute machinery under the EU Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC. Manufacturers must conduct a risk assessment covering mechanical, electrical, and hydrogen-specific hazards; apply relevant harmonised standards (including EN ISO 22734 for hydrogen generators); prepare a technical file; issue an EU Declaration of Conformity; and affix CE marking before placing the product on the EU market. The Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU (LVD) and EMC Directive 2014/30/EU apply to the integrated electrical subsystems. [UNVERIFIED: the Machinery Regulation (EU) 2023/1230, which replaces 2006/42/EC, has a transition period; applicability date for new products should be verified against official OJ publication.]
summary.zh: 水电解槽属于欧盟机械指令2006/42/EC项下的机械。制造商须就机械、电气及氢气特定危害进行风险评估；应用相关协调标准（包括氢气发生器EN ISO 22734）；编制技术文件；签发欧盟符合性声明；并在将产品投放欧盟市场前加贴CE标志。低电压指令2014/35/EU（LVD）和电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU适用于集成电气子系统。[UNVERIFIED: 替代2006/42/EC的《机械法规》（EU）2023/1230已有过渡期；新产品的适用日期须核实官方公报公布情况。]
summary.zht: 水電解槽屬於歐盟機械指令2006/42/EC項下的機械。製造商須就機械、電氣及氫氣特定危害進行風險評估；應用相關協調標準（包括氫氣發生器EN ISO 22734）；編製技術文件；簽發歐盟符合性聲明；並在將產品投放歐盟市場前加貼CE標誌。低電壓指令2014/35/EU（LVD）和電磁兼容指令2014/30/EU適用於集成電氣子系統。[UNVERIFIED: 替代2006/42/EC的《機械法規》（EU）2023/1230已有過渡期；新產品的適用日期須核實官方公報公布情況。]

standards_or_laws: Machinery Regulation (EU) 2023/1230 [UNVERIFIED — transition period; verify OJ for effective date]
EN ISO 22734:2019 (Hydrogen generators using water electrolysis — Industrial, commercial and residential applications)
EN ISO 13849-1 (Safety of machinery — Safety-related parts of control systems)

summary.en: China does not have a single direct equivalent to the EU Machinery Directive for electrolyzers. Relevant national requirements include GB standards for pressure vessels (GB 150 series, supervised by SAMR/TSB for special equipment licensing), electrical safety standards (GB 4706 series for household appliances; GB/T standards for industrial equipment), and EMC standards (GB/T 17626 series). Hydrogen-generating equipment may also be subject to special equipment (特种设备) registration under the Special Equipment Safety Law. [UNVERIFIED: specific compulsory certification (CCC) scope for electrolyzers should be verified with SAMR.]
summary.zh: 中国没有针对电解槽的单一直接对应欧盟机械指令的法规。相关国家要求包括：压力容器GB标准（GB 150系列，由市场监管总局/特种设备局监管特种设备许可）、电气安全标准（GB 4706系列适用于家用电器；工业设备适用GB/T标准）及电磁兼容标准（GB/T 17626系列）。制氢设备还可能须依据《特种设备安全法》进行特种设备注册。[UNVERIFIED: 电解槽强制认证（CCC）的具体范围须向市场监管总局核实。]
summary.zht: 中國沒有針對電解槽的單一直接對應歐盟機械指令的法規。相關國家要求包括：壓力容器GB標準（GB 150系列，由市場監管總局/特種設備局監管特種設備許可）、電氣安全標準（GB 4706系列適用於家用電器；工業設備適用GB/T標準）及電磁相容標準（GB/T 17626系列）。制氫設備還可能須依據《特種設備安全法》進行特種設備註冊。[UNVERIFIED: 電解槽強制認證（CCC）的具體範圍須向市場監管總局核實。]

standards_or_laws: Special Equipment Safety Law (特种设备安全法) 2013
GB/T 37563-2019 (质子交换膜燃料电池发电系统安全要求 — adjacent reference)
GB 4943.1 (IT equipment safety, IEC 60950/62368 equivalent) [UNVERIFIED — scope for industrial electrolyzer]

gap.en: China lacks a unified machinery CE-equivalent certification pathway. For EU market entry, manufacturers must obtain CE marking under Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC (or successor Regulation 2023/1230 once effective), LVD 2014/35/EU, and EMC Directive 2014/30/EU as a minimum. Chinese national certifications (GB standards, special equipment licences) and any voluntary CCC marks do not substitute for EU CE marking. Manufacturers must compile an EU-format technical file, perform an EU-compliant risk assessment per EN ISO 12100, and may need a Notified Body for certain machinery categories. EN ISO 22734 is the key harmonised product standard for hydrogen generators.
gap.zh: 中国缺乏统一的机械CE等效认证路径。进入欧盟市场，制造商至少须取得机械指令2006/42/EC（或2023/1230法规生效后的后续法规）、低电压指令2014/35/EU及电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU项下的CE标志。中国国家认证（GB标准、特种设备许可）及任何自愿性CCC标志均不能替代欧盟CE标志。制造商须编制欧盟格式技术文件，依据EN ISO 12100进行符合欧盟要求的风险评估，特定机械类别可能还需公告机构介入。EN ISO 22734是氢气发生器的关键协调产品标准。
gap.zht: 中國缺乏統一的機械CE等效認證路徑。進入歐盟市場，製造商至少須取得機械指令2006/42/EC（或2023/1230法規生效後的後續法規）、低電壓指令2014/35/EU及電磁相容指令2014/30/EU項下的CE標誌。中國國家認證（GB標準、特種設備許可）及任何自願性CCC標誌均不能替代歐盟CE標誌。製造商須編製歐盟格式技術文件，依據EN ISO 12100進行符合歐盟要求的風險評估，特定機械類別可能還需公告機構介入。EN ISO 22734是氫氣發生器的關鍵協調產品標準。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (EU) — CE marking under Machinery Directive (and LVD/EMC) required before EU market placement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (CN) — Special equipment licensing (SAMR) required for pressure-bearing electrolyzer vessels; CCC scope for complete unit [UNVERIFIED]

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Hydrogen water electrolyzers sold in the EU must carry CE marking under the Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC, LVD 2014/35/EU, and EMC Directive 2014/30/EU. EN ISO 22734 is the primary harmonised product standard. Chinese GB-based certifications and special equipment licences do not fulfil EU CE marking obligations. Where the electrolyzer also operates in an explosive atmosphere zone, ATEX Directive 2014/34/EU compliance (see row eleceu-atex-explosive-atmosphere) is additionally required. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在欧盟销售的氢气水电解槽须依据机械指令2006/42/EC、低电压指令2014/35/EU及电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU加贴CE标志。EN ISO 22734是主要协调产品标准。中国GB认证及特种设备许可不能履行欧盟CE标志义务。若电解槽同时在爆炸性环境区域运行，还须额外符合ATEX指令2014/34/EU（见条目eleceu-atex-explosive-atmosphere）。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律意见。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在歐盟銷售的氫氣水電解槽須依據機械指令2006/42/EC、低電壓指令2014/35/EU及電磁相容指令2014/30/EU加貼CE標誌。EN ISO 22734是主要協調產品標準。中國GB認證及特種設備許可不能履行歐盟CE標誌義務。若電解槽同時在爆炸性環境區域運行，還須額外符合ATEX指令2014/34/EU（見條目eleceu-atex-explosive-atmosphere）。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律意見。
